questions.q: What percentage of books submitted to Kobo's self-publishing program in 2025 were rejected due to suspected AI generation?
questions.correctText: The company rejected nearly 45 percent of the books submitted to its self-publishing program in 2025, with about 80 percent of those rejections due to suspicions of AI generation.

questions.q: According to a Pew Research Center survey from October 2025, what is the primary format Americans still opt for when reading books?
questions.correctText: Print books remain the most popular format, with roughly two-thirds of U.S. adults reporting they read a physical book in the past 12 months.

questions.q: What is the title of the book detailing the Roosevelt brothers' 1929 expedition to find a giant panda?
options: The Beast in the Clouds: The Roosevelt Brothers' Deadly Quest to Find the Mythical Giant Panda
Quest for the Panda: The Roosevelt Brothers' Himalayan Adventure
Roosevelt's Boys and the Black-and-White Bear
The Panda Hunters of the Himalayas
questions.correctText: The book detailing this expedition is titled "The Beast in the Clouds: The Roosevelt Brothers' Deadly Quest to Find the Mythical Giant Panda."

questions.q: Who is reportedly being considered by King Charles to write the first official biography of Queen Elizabeth II?
questions.correctText: King Charles wants historian Anna Keay to write the first official biography of Queen Elizabeth II.

questions.q: Mom's Book Nook has donated how many books to children in Sarasota over the past year?
questions.correctText: Mom's Book Nook has donated more than 7,000 books to children in Sarasota over the past year.

questions.q: The Artemis II moonshot is noted to reflect a vision present in which 19th-century novel?
options: From the Earth to the Moon by Jules Verne
Twenty Thousand Leagues Under the Seas by Jules Verne
Around the World in Eighty Days by Jules Verne
The Mysterious Island by Jules Verne
questions.correctText: The Artemis II moonshot reflects a spacefaring vision present in Jules Verne's 19th-century novel "From the Earth to the Moon."

questions.q: What is the title of The Guardian's recent list of books recommended to read before turning 25?
options: 25 books to read before you turn 25
The Ultimate Reading List for Young Adults
questions.correctText: The Guardian's list is titled "25 books to read before you turn 25."
